titleStmt.title: SII 27.365: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 365. (A.R. No. 332 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 7) set up in the inner prākāra of Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1373, Prajōtapatti, Phālguṇa śu. 1, Monday, corresponding to 1452 A.D., February 21.

It registers a gift of land by Nāgañcha Toḷaha and his younger brother Bemmaṇañcha who was enjoying the kumāravṛitti for feeding brāhmaṇas in the satra attached to the temple of Mahādēva at Surāla and set up by Mādāḍi Toḷaha. It was entrusted to madhyastha Vāsudēva-chhātra, son of Kēśava-chhātra of Tekkaṭṭi. It also records another similar gift by Rāma-uḍupa.
The supplementary record found at the end registers another gift of land made for a similar purpose by Nāgañcha Toḷaha and Bemmaṇañcha to Mādhava sēnaba and Purusa-sēnaba, sons of Gaṅgādharasēnabōva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . namastuṁga ṣirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāra
vē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya ṣakavaruṣa 1373 neya varttamāna prajōtpatya saṁvatsarada phālguna śu 1 lu sōma
vāradalu śrīmatu sakala guṇa saṁpaṁnarappa nāgaṁca toḷaharu Avara taṁ
ma kumāra Urattiya beṁmaṇaṁcaru yeraḍūru nālkumaneya baṁdhuga
ḷu neṇaguṁdi muvattunalu bāḷumuṁtāgi toḷaharu beṁmaṁṇaṁcaru Oṁdā
gi tekkaṭṭiya kēṣavatsātrara maga madhyasta vāsudēvatsātrarige nāyaru mūlavāgi yeṟa
du koṭa bāḷina ṣilā śāsanadakrama veṁteṁdare grāmadoḷagaṇa bāḷu ṭina ho
sagaddeya catusīmeya vivara muḍalu
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu boḷeyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
da mūḍalu baḍagalu kaṭṭina kalliṁdaṁ paḍuravana gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁ
tī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bayalagade bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalū hadināṟu
mūḍemekki nālkumūḍe Ubhayaṁ mūḍe yiṁdaṁ Oḷaguḷa mane maneṭhāu me
ki make nekki niḍilu nīru dhāresahavāgi yiṁtiṣṭanū Ā caṁdrākkasthāyiyāgi bāḷuvaṁtāgi
nāyaru mūlavāgi nīṟadhāreyaneṟadu koṭaru toḷaharu beṁmaṁṇa caru Ī śāsana pramāṇi
na bāḷikeyanū nāyaru mūlavāgi bāḷuvaṁtāgi nīradhāreyanāṁtukoṁḍa vāsudēva chātranu Ī bā
ḷikeya baddavaruṣaṁpratiyalū naḍasuva Akki hattake hadināṟaṟa hāne nāghaṁḍugadalū mū 30
Akṣaradalū mūvattu mūḍe Akkiyanu surāla mahādēvara saṁnidhiyalū mādāḍi toḷaharu
māḍida dharmachatrada brāhmaṟa bhōjanakke naḍasi bahanu bāḷukaṭina brahmarige nāgaṁca toḷaharu māḍi
da dharmakke hāne teṁgineṁṇeyanū kālakālakke naḍasibahanu mattaṁ hosaūroḷage Āśraṁṇana hoḷe
yatakke toḷahara kayyali mūlava koḍamaneya bāgila gaddeyamēle rāma Uḍupa māḍida dharma mahā
dēvara saṁnidhiyalū naḍava chatrakke nāghaṁḍugadalū A mū 3 hā 16 maneya mūḍa gaddeya mēle
ya bhatta mu 12 maneya paḍuvana gaddeya mēle dīvaḷigeya habbada valige bhattamū 1 Upākarmada ve
ccakke kāṭi haṇa Oṁdu yiṣṭanū vāsudēvacchātranu taṁna saṁtāna pāraṁpareyalū tettu bāḷuva
ru śāsana pramāṇina nāyaru mūlada bāḷike mūladabāḷikeya mēle teṟu Osage
Anāya sanāya yese biḍāra Audū salladū sarvvamāṁnyavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi
yāgi pālisa baheveṁdu nāgaṁca toḷaharu beṁmaṇaṁcaru Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasikoṭṭa
śilāśāsana yī śāsanake toḷaharu beṁmaṇaṁcara Oppa śrīmahādēvaru yeraḍūra nā
lku maneya baṁdhugaḷu neṇaguṁda muvattanūlu bāḷavara Oppa śrīmahādēvaru dānapālana
yōrmadhyē dānātsrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
mattaṁ nāgaṁcatoḷaharu Avarataṁma beṁmaṇaṁcaru Oṁdāṇa gaṁgādhara sēnabōvana makkaḷu mādhava
sēnaba purusa sēnabakkaḷige nāyarumūlavāgi Eṟadukoṭa bāḷuhosa gadeya teṁka baḍi hebārana gade
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu bittuva bayalu mūḍe 4 mtaṁ kuḍuravana gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu naṭṭikallaṁ baḍagalu bittuva maki
mūḍe 3 mtaṁ śāṁti ditiya bage bittuva mekkemūḍe 7 Aṁttuhadinālku mūḍe bittuva bāḷanu nāyaru mula
vāgi baddu mahādēvara saṁnidhiyalū naḍava chatrake hadināṟaṟa hāne nāghaṁḍugadalū Akki mū 12
Digital edition of SII 27.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
